title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
